chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 205 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.03.2016 1. For Orders on MA 3403/16 2. For Orders on MA 1512/16 3. For Katcha Peshi Mr. Ahsan Gul Dahri, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro Addl.A.G. Petitioner states that his application for mutation of khata of his late father namely Ali Akbar in favour of his legal heirs is pending before Mukhtiarkar Taluka Sakrand District Shaheed Benazirabad / respondent No.3 since January, 2016 but no action is being taken by him on that application. Learned A.A.G. present in court in other matters waives notice of this petition and states that this petition can be disposed of by directing the respondent No.3 to decide the application of the petitioner strictly in accordance with law within one month. The counsel for petitioner has shown his satisfaction and seeks disposal of this petition in above terms. Order accordingly. The petition is disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Karar/-
